name: Nine-Tailed Fox
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>九</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>尾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>び</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>狐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きつね</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can Tribute 2 monsters; Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Nine-Tailed Fox" once per turn. If this card that was Special Summoned from the GY attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 2 "Fox Tokens" (Zombie/FIRE/Level 2/ATK 500/DEF 500).
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can Tribute 2 monsters; Special Summon this card. You can only use this effect of "Nine-Tailed Fox" once per turn. If this card that was Special Summoned from the GY attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 2 "Fox Tokens" (Zombie/FIRE/Level 2/ATK 500/DEF 500).

sets.set: Egyptian God Deck: Slifer the Sky Dragon

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
